prompts.name: create-provider-skill
prompts.prompt: Create a provider integration skill for asana.com.
prompts.expected_behavior: Plan a package at skills/asana.com with SKILL.md, manifest.json, tests.json, and a catalog.json entry.

prompts.name: migrate-json-skill
prompts.prompt: Migrate skills/github.com/repo-maintenance.json to the current skills repo format.
prompts.expected_behavior: Convert the JSON skill into SKILL.md and manifest.json, update catalog.json, and remove the old JSON file.

prompts.name: reject-adhoc-json
prompts.expected_behavior: Do not create an ad-hoc JSON skill file. Create or update skills/airtable.com/SKILL.md and manifest.json instead.
